name: Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection')
description: The product constructs a command string using user input without properly delimiting arguments, allowing attackers to inject additional command-line arguments (e.g., '--admin' or '-r') that alter the command's intended behavior.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that is placed into a command argument list flowing to EXTERNAL[command_exec] without a CONTROL node that validates the input contains no argument delimiters (hyphens, dashes, equals signs) or uses a safe argument passing API that separates arguments from data
